title: Soulecttion White Label: 019
content:
Rooted in São Paulo, Brazil, the production duo DKVPZ (pronounced Deekapz) delivers our 19th iteration of the White Label series. With recent features in the 300th episode of Soulection Radio, it’s no secret that their rhythmic, afro-funk infused sound is just as impressive as it is addicting to listen to.

The two met back in 2014 when booked to play the same show. After having a b2b set, they decided then-and-there to start producing together under one name. Although their sound has developed over time, the pair has found their groove and give us four featured tracks (and a bonus!) that blend together upbeat drumlines, melodic samples, trap, and of course, afro-funk.

While both of them grew up with music in their family, DKVPZ’s mission is newness—to continually create fresh sounds by combining their views and production expertise.
